title: Creeper Infection
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b266d322a2507300eb7814789d8afa991f53987a_0.webp)
# **Mod Description**



Creeper Infection transforms the humble Creeper into a force of apocalyptic chaos. With this mod, Creepers attack ALL mobs — passive, neutral, and hostile alike. But that's not the worst part...

Every mob killed by a Creeper is reborn as a Creeper, spreading the infection like wildfire. Watch in horror as the world you once knew crumbles under a growing horde of explosive green nightmares.



## **Features:**
- Makes creepers attack all mobs
- When a mob dies to a creeper it becomes another creeper
